items.desc: Hubballi: MP M Nagaraj distributes 42 e-tricycles worth Rs 16 lakh via PMD-VK and ALIMCO, boosting mobility for differently-abled and seniors.

items.desc: Delhi’s Begumpur: 46-year-old woman dies after construction material lift collapses on her; police file negligence case, cite poor safety, worker hurt.

items.desc: DDA planted 6.6 lakh saplings in Delhi, hitting nearly 30% of its 23 lakh target under Ek Ped Maa Ke Naam; drive runs July–Sept across parks and ridges.

items.desc: YSRCP gives Rs 49 lakh aid in Visakhapatnam to families of seven fishermen missing in Bay of Bengal; Rs 7 lakh each to six presumed dead and survivor.
